title: 278 BookingIntent handoff
description: Executable Phase 3 to Phase 4 handoff contract. Phase 4 must start from this lineage-bound seed instead of browser-local booking state.

episodeRef.description: Episode ref carried from triage lineage.

lineageCaseLinkRef.description: Proposed booking child link minted during Phase 3 handoff.

timeframe.description: Requested timeframe summary carried from triage.

clinicianType.description: Requested clinician type carried from triage.

patientPreferenceSummary.description: Patient preference summary emitted by Phase 3.

createdFromDecisionId.description: Endpoint decision that created the handoff.

decisionEpochRef.description: Current live DecisionEpoch at handoff time.

decisionSupersessionRecordRef.description: Decision supersession record captured at handoff time, if any.

lifecycleLeaseRef.description: Request lifecycle lease captured at handoff time.

leaseAuthorityRef.description: Authority that minted the lifecycle lease.

ownershipEpoch.description: Request ownership epoch captured at handoff time.

fencingToken.description: Single-writer fence token captured at handoff time.

currentLineageFenceEpoch.description: Current lineage fence epoch at handoff time.

intentState.description: Governed handoff posture. Booking launch is legal only while the intent remains proposed or acknowledged on the current lineage.

commandActionRecordRef.description: Phase 3 command action record for the handoff.

commandSettlementRecordRef.description: Phase 3 settlement record for the handoff.

lifecycleClosureAuthority.description: Booking handoff does not close the request; LifecycleCoordinator remains the only closure authority.

x-governedInvariants: Phase 4 must start from BookingIntent lineage and may not open a blank appointment page.
decisionEpochRef maps directly onto BookingCase.sourceDecisionEpochRef and must still match the current unsuperseded triage decision before booking mutation begins.
decisionSupersessionRecordRef maps directly onto BookingCase.sourceDecisionSupersessionRef and freezes mutation when superseded.
lifecycleLeaseRef, ownershipEpoch, fencingToken, and currentLineageFenceEpoch preserve request ownership into BookingCase creation and all later mutation paths.
LifecycleCoordinator remains the only request-closure authority; the booking branch may settle only its own lineage work.
